instruction: Route the citizen's request to the correct government department.
baseline_prompt: You are a citizen-services router. Route the citizen's request to the correct government department. Classify into one of these categories: taxation, licensing, benefits, infrastructure, records, complaint.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: I never received my return forms in the mail this year. Is there a way to download them online or can you send me another copy before the deadline?
We're hosting a community festival in the park with live music and food trucks. What paperwork do we need to file to make this event official?
My partner and I both lost our jobs when the factory closed. We have three kids and our savings are running out. What emergency assistance is available?
The storm drain on my street is completely clogged with debris and leaves. Every time it rains, the entire block floods because the water has nowhere to go.
I need proof of my legal union from 1995 to update my beneficiary information with my employer.
The parking situation at your facility is a nightmare. There are never enough spaces and I had to circle for 40 minutes just to attend my scheduled appointment.
My deceased father's estate needs to file a final return. What forms are required and what is the deadline for submitting these?
I'm opening a small dog grooming business from my home and want to know what permissions are required to operate legally in the city.
My work hours were reduced significantly due to company cutbacks. I'm still employed but earning much less than before. Can I get supplemental assistance to help cover the gap?
The traffic signal at the Highway 12 and Route 45 intersection has been malfunctioning. It stays red in all directions for several minutes, causing major traffic backups.
I need a certified copy of my daughter's certificate from when she was born in 2018 at County General Hospital.
I've been trying to reach someone at your office for three weeks now and nobody ever picks up the phone. This is absolutely unacceptable service for taxpayers who fund your operations.
I worked remotely for a company in another state for six months. Do I need to file in both states and how does that affect what I pay locally?
My construction company is starting a new commercial building project on Oak Street and we need to obtain the proper authorization before breaking ground.
I need help understanding the eligibility requirements for low-income family support. My household income fluctuates and I'm not sure if we qualify.

test.query: Can someone please come repair the sidewalk in front of 342 Washington Street? Several concrete slabs are cracked and lifted, creating a tripping hazard for people walking by.
I'm looking for the official paperwork showing when my son was born here in 2015, as his school is requesting it.
The staff member I spoke with yesterday was incredibly rude and dismissive when I asked a simple question about my application status. I expect better treatment from public servants.
I made charitable donations throughout the year and want to make sure I'm claiming them correctly to reduce what I owe.
I just bought a boat and need to know the process for getting it properly registered with the state before taking it out on the water.
I'm a single parent with two young children and my income barely covers our basic needs. Are there any support programs that could help with food, childcare costs, or housing?
I need to verify the chain of title for a commercial building located downtown before finalizing a sale.
The website information is outdated and contradicts what I was told over the phone. This lack of coordination wastes everyone's time and creates unnecessary confusion.
How do I update my withholding information? I got married last month and want to make sure the right amount is being taken out going forward.
I'm a contractor and need to pull permits for electrical work I'll be doing on a residential property renovation next week.
My unemployment claim was denied and I don't understand why. I was laid off through no fault of my own and I think there's been a mistake with my application.
I'm trying to get a copy of the deed for my grandmother's house that was transferred to me after she passed away.
I visited your downtown office today and waited for over three hours only to be told I was in the wrong line. The signage is confusing and staff weren't helpful at all.
Can you help me understand the property assessment on my home? The valuation seems too high and I think my annual bill is incorrect as a result.
My driver's credential is about to expire and I need to schedule an appointment to get it renewed at the earliest available time.
I lost my job three weeks ago and I'm struggling to make ends meet. I need to know what kind of financial assistance I might be eligible for while I look for new employment.
Where can I request a duplicate of my certificate of live birth? I lost my original and need it for my passport application.
Why does it take so long to get anything done at your agency? I submitted my paperwork two months ago and still haven't heard back. This bureaucracy is out of control.
My employer didn't withhold the correct amount from my paychecks this year and now I owe a large sum. Can I set up a payment plan to pay this off over time?
I need to renew my food handler's certificate before it expires next month. What documents do I need to submit and where should I send them?
I received a letter saying my assistance case is under review, but I don't know what that means or if I need to submit additional information. Can someone explain the process?
How do I obtain documentation proving ownership of the residential property I purchased last year on Maple Street?
I'm extremely dissatisfied with how my case was handled. The representative gave me incorrect information that caused me to miss an important deadline, and now I'm facing penalties.
I sold my house this year and made a profit. Do I need to report this as income and if so, are there any deductions available for selling a primary residence?
